title: Drift Horizon Online
description:
Single Player Mode• Earn drift points and make money

• Discover hidden bonuses across the city

• Unlock drift achievements

• Experience different physics modes (Tarmac & Snow)

 

Online Mode• Play with friends or drivers from around the world

• Explore the city map together

• Compete to achieve the best drift scores

Main Menu & Garage• Purchase new cars

• Upgrade and customize your vehicles

• Buy parts from the store

• Store up to 100 parts in your inventory

• Install or sell any part

Gameplay• Clean and optimized graphics

• Smooth and optimized performance

• Realistic car sounds (blow-off, exhaust, backfires, tire skids, etc.)

• Realistic driving physics

• Dynamic camera system

• Steering wheel support

• Fuel system

• Tire wear system

• Engine wear and repair system
description_short: Drift Horizon Online - immersive drifting simulator featuring smooth optimized visuals, realistic physics, and authentic car sounds including blow-off, exhaust, backfires and tire skids.
